items.text: GCAS_singleton shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton shall maintain a real-valued recursive variable t with initial value 0.0 and step size 0.1

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton shall define constant minHeightAllowed as 200.0

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute height variable
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton shall invoke kinematicLinearization function from gcas_nodes library, passing t as parameter, to compute height variable

items.text: GCAS_singleton shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7
items.fragment: GCAS_singleton shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7
items.requirement_fragment: GCAS_singleton shall set output port timeToRecovery to constant 3.7

items.text: When simulation time t >= 3.7, computed height shall always be > minHeightAllowed
items.fragment: When simulation time t >= 3.7, computed height shall always be > minHeightAllowed
items.requirement_fragment: When simulation time t >= 3.7, computed height shall always be > minHeightAllowed

items.text: When simulation time t >= 3.7, current height shall be > previous height
items.fragment: When simulation time t >= 3.7, current height shall be > previous height
